def create_app():
    # Load .env early
    load_dotenv()

    # --- Flask App Initialization ---
    app = Flask(__name__)
    
    # --- CRITICAL CORS FIX ---
    CORS(app, resources={r"/*": {
        "origins": "*",
        "allow_headers": ["Content-Type", "Authorization", "X-API-Key", "X-Trace-Id"],
        "methods": ["GET", "POST", "OPTIONS", "PUT", "DELETE"]
    }})

    # --- Database Configuration ---
    # FIX: Added fallback to "sqlite:///./sdlc.db" so it doesn't crash

def run_migrations_offline():
    """Run migrations in 'offline' mode.

    This configures the context with just a URL
    and not an Engine, though an Engine is acceptable
    here as well.  By skipping the Engine creation
    we don't even need a DBAPI to be available.

    Calls to context.execute() here emit the given string to the
    script output.

    """
    url = config.get_main_option("sqlalchemy.url")
    context.configure(
        url=url, target_metadata=get_metadata(), literal_bi

nodes.name: get_current_user_id
create_project
nodes.raw_source:
def create_project(json: ProjectCreate):
    user_id = get_current_user_id()
    if not user_id: return jsonify({"error": "Unauthorized"}), 401
    try:
        new_project = Project(name=json.name, description=json.description, user_id=user_id)
        db.session.add(new_project)
        db.session.commit()
        return jsonify(new_project.to_dict()), 201
    except Exception as e:
        db.session.rollback()
        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500

nodes.name: list_projects
nodes.raw_source:
def list_projects():
    user_id = get_current_user_id()
    if not user_id: return jsonify({"error": "Unauthorized"}), 401
    stmt = db.select(Project).filter_by(user_id=user_id).order_by(Project.created_at.desc())
    projects = db.session.scalars(stmt).unique().all()
    return jsonify({"count": len(projects), "projects": [p.to_dict() for p in projects]}), 200

def get_project_history(project_id):
    user_id = get_current_user_id()
    if not user_id: return jsonify({"error": "Unauthorized"}), 401
    
    project = db.session.scalar(db.select(Project).filter_by(id=project_id, user_id=user_id))
    if not project: return jsonify({"error": "Project not found"}), 404

    # MANUAL HISTORY FETCH (Ignore the relationship cache)
    logs = db.session.scalars(db.select(RequestLog).filter_by(project_id=project_id).order_by(RequestLog.created_at.desc(

nodes.name: delete_project
nodes.raw_source:
def delete_project(project_id):
    user_id = get_current_user_id()
    if not user_id: return jsonify({"error": "Unauthorized"}), 401
    project = db.session.scalar(db.select(Project).filter_by(id=project_id, user_id=user_id))
    if not project: return jsonify({"error": "Project not found"}), 404
    db.session.delete(project)
    db.session.commit()
    return jsonify({"message": "Project deleted"}), 200

nodes.name: _extract_json
nodes.raw_source:
def _extract_json(text: str) -> str:
    # Robust extraction to handle cases where AI adds ```json ... ``` wrappers
    s, e = text.find("{"), text.rfind("}")
    return text[s:e + 1] if (s >= 0 and e > s) else text
